definition: gas detector that uses a broadband IR light source and optical filter to select a narrow-band spectral region that overlaps with the absorption region of the gas of interest

definition_ml.en: gas detector that uses a broadband IR light source and optical filter to select a narrow-band spectral region that overlaps with the absorption region of the gas of interest
definition_ml.de: Gaswarnsensor, der eine breitbandige Lichtquelle und einen optischen Filter verwendet, um einen schmalbandigen Spektralbereich auszuwählen, der sich mit dem Absorptionsbereich der zu messenden Gaskomponenten überschneidet

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
